political.s: USAspending.gov: ~$920M in federal contract obligations in FY2024 (primarily Department of Defense).

charity.s: $35M reported corporate giving in 2024 (~0.07% of revenue) via Ernst & Young Foundation.

environment.s: Climate-commitment coalition member: LEAF Coalition (since 2022). LEAF Coalition corporate funder.

labor.s: Mental Health at Work Pledge signatory (since 2022): public commitment to gold-standard workplace mental-health policy, C-suite accountability, and measurable outcomes.

dei.s: DiversityInc Top 50 #3 (2024) — workforce diversity + executive accountability. Seramount Working Mother 100 Best (2024) — paid parental + family-care leave + return coaching. [DiversityInc Top 50 #3 · Working Mother 100 Best]

wiki.industry: professional services industry, accounting services, management consulting industry
wiki.extract: EY, previously known as Ernst & Young, is a multinational professional services network based in London, England. Along with Deloitte, KPMG and PwC, it is one of the Big Four professional services firms. The EY network is composed of member firms of Ernst & Young Global Limited, a UK company limited by guarantee.

governance.s: Wikidata records a notable event: legal settlement. (Wikidata Q489097)
